zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanne Pottkins於1501年出生在英國艾可時，她的父親Henery Pottkins11歲，母親Anne12歲。她於1515年與William Tyllesworth在英國英格蘭艾可素斯明斯特結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。她去世於1593年2月1日在英國倫敦享年92歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanne Pottkins于1501年出生在英国艾可时，她的父亲Henery Pottkins11岁，母亲Anne12岁。她于1515年与William Tyllesworth在英国英格兰艾可素斯明斯特结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。她去世于1593年2月1日在英国倫敦享年92岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pottkins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: relationship name, variant of Potkin with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Potkin
meanings: English: relationship name from the Middle English and Middle Dutch personal name Potkin ‘young Philip’, a Flemish diminutive form of Pot, itself an Old French pet form of Philip ; see Philpott and Pott , and compare Potman and Pottle . Flemings settled in Norfolk and Suffolk in the 12th and 13th centuries.

nameMeanings.name: Joanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: When Joanne Pottkins was born in 1501, in Essex, England, her father, Henery Pottkins, was 11 and her mother, Anne, was 12. She married William Tyllesworth in 1515, in Southminster, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. She died on 1 February 1593, in London, England, at the age of 92.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanne Pottkins est née en 1501, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Henery Pottkins, avait 11 ans et sa mère, Anne, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé William Tyllesworth en 1515, à Southminster, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 février 1593, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 92 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Joanne Pottkins(이)가 1501년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henery Pottkins(은)는 11세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 소우스민스터에서 William Tyllesworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1593년 2월 1일 영국 런던에서 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanne Pottkins родилась в 1501 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Henery Pottkins было 11 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Tyllesworth в 1515 г. в местности соутминстир, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Она умерла 1 февраля 1593 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 92 лет.
